title: Xi Jinping to meet Kim Jong Un in rare visit to North Korea
summary_full: It is taking place weeks after Xi met the leaders of the US and Russia - two countries that loom large over North Korea's foreign policy.
summary_public: It is taking place weeks after Xi met the leaders of the US and Russia - two countries that loom large over North Korea's foreign policy.
